negative_cases.why_wrong: Oomr String Voltage Probe: keeps the file compilable but forces the observable output path low, so it can pass include/instance smoke checks while failing the required behavior to Resolve the sigpath string to the top-level vin node.

Oomr String Voltage Probe: keeps the main operator syntax but collapses the computed value through the wrong condition, so coarse smoke cases may run while boundary and waveform checks for Use a string out-of-module reference in a voltage probe fail.
Oomr String Voltage Probe: introduces incorrect initialization or state bias, so startup and reset-sensitive checks fail while the model still compiles and produces activity.

Oomr String Voltage Probe: offsets the secondary metric or observable path, so the primary waveform may look plausible while calibrated checker evidence for Resolve the sigpath string to the top-level vin node fails.

Oomr String Voltage Probe: scales the final observable response, so compile and rough activity checks can pass while calibrated output checks for Use a string out-of-module reference in a voltage probe fail.
